thesis: Airbnb operates a global two-sided marketplace connecting hosts who list homes and experiences with guests who book short-term stays. **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue was **$12.2 billion** (+10%) on **533 million** nights and seats booked and **$91.3 billion** gross booking value. **[Fact]** FY2025 free cash flow was **$4.6 billion** ($7.38 per diluted share) on an asset-light model with **$6.9 billion** cash and **$2.0 billion** long-term debt. **[Inference]** Owner economics are driven by booking volume, average daily rate, and take rate; Q1 2026 accelerated with revenue **+18%** and nights **+9%**.
why_market_wrong: There is **no dated mispricing signal** (HK predictive attribute: **none**). **[Inference]** Generalists focus on GAAP net income (**$2.5 billion**, down 5%) and rising stock-based compensation (**$1.6 billion**), while owner cash remains strong. **[Inference]** The market may underweight **$3.8 billion** of 2025 share repurchases and **$5.6 billion** remaining authorization as aligned capital return.

key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share

open_questions: Confirm live price before sizing; live_price_confirmed false in valuation.json.
Monitor city-level STR bans and lodging-tax accruals (37,000+ jurisdictions Q1 2026).
No approved third-party sources indexed; re-run scan when Substacks or HK material added.
